citation.article_title: Brainstorm pipeline analysis of resting-state data from the open MEG archive
citation.author: Niso
citation.unstructured_citation: Niso, G., Tadel, F., Bock, E., Cousineau, M., Santos, A., & Baillet, S. (2019). Brainstorm pipeline analysis of resting-state data from the open MEG archive. Front. Neurosci., 13, 284. https://doi.org/10.3389/fnins.2019.00284

citation.article_title: NIRSTORM: A brainstorm extension dedicated to functional near-infrared spectroscopy data analysis, advanced 3D reconstructions, and optimal probe design

citation.unstructured_citation: Delaire, É., Vincent, T., Cai, Z., Machado, A., Hugueville, L., Schwartz, D., Tadel, F., Cassani, R., Bherer, L., Lina, J.-M., Pélégrini-Issac, M., & Grova, C. (2025). NIRSTORM: A brainstorm extension dedicated to functional near-infrared spectroscopy data analysis, advanced 3D reconstructions, and optimal probe design. Neurophotonics, 12(2), 025011. https://doi.org/10.1117/1.NPh.12.2.025011

citation.article_title: LeGUI: A fast and accurate graphical user interface for automated detection and anatomical localization of intracranial electrodes
citation.author: Davis

LeGUI: A fast and accurate graphical user interface for automated detection and anatomical localization of intracranial electrodes. Front. Neurosci., 15, 769872. https://doi.org/10.3389/fnins.2021.769872

citation.article_title: MEG/EEG group analysis with brainstorm

citation.article_title: Validation of semi-automated anatomically labeled SEEG contacts in a brain atlas for mapping connectivity in focal epilepsy

Validation of semi-automated anatomically labeled SEEG contacts in a brain atlas for mapping connectivity in focal epilepsy. Epilepsia Open, 6(3), 493–503. https://doi.org/10.1002/epi4.12499

NeuroImage, 267, 119851. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.neuroimage.2022.119851
